name: SToMP-AD phase 2 D+Q registry
summary: Phase 2 randomized quadruple-masked dasatinib plus quercetin trial in Alzheimer's disease, active not recruiting with safety primary endpoint and no posted results in the June 11, 2026 ClinicalTrials.gov API check.
population: Participants with Alzheimer's disease in a randomized D+Q safety and feasibility trial.

trial_details.horizon_note: Month-only registry dates were normalized to the first day of the month in structured fields.
trial_details.why_it_matters: SToMP-AD is a controlled D+Q neurodegeneration trial that can materially change safety and functional interpretation once results are available.
